caption: The video captures a man performing live music in front of an audience. He is seated and playing an acoustic guitar while singing into a microphone. The man is wearing glasses, a white shirt, and a black vest adorned with decorative patterns. His hair is tied back, and he appears to be deeply engaged in his performance. The audience, visible in the foreground, is attentively watching and listening. The setting seems to be indoors, with wooden blinds covering the windows in the background, creating a warm and intimate atmosphere. The logo "ORCA" is displayed in the bottom right corner of the screen, suggesting that the event may be associated with this organization.
